desc: DONE offline: decompressed and structurally compared T8132, T8140, and exact T6041 SPTM. Domain/table/IOMMU ids, XNU permission 0x12, nine-op func_state order, handler arguments, NVMe mapping, and SART boundary are stable; every function/bootstrap address is variant-specific. T8132/T8140 have identical NVMe/SART string inventories, while T6041 adds segment-count and NLB violations. This validates T8132 as a semantic proxy but forbids reusing offsets/policy. Result: done/2026-07-23-sptm-three-soc-structural-diff.md.
author: fable
